title: Display Property
description: Use the display property to control how elements are rendered: block, inline, inline-block, and none
html:
Home About Contact

This text should be hidden

validationRules.message: Menu items should have 10px vertical padding
Menu items should have 20px horizontal padding
The hidden text should not be displayed

hints.text: The display property determines how an element generates boxes. Inline-block allows width/height and padding on inline elements.
Set 'display: inline-block' and 'padding: 10px 20px' on .menu-item. Set 'display: none' on .hidden-text.
